records.question: Which things of type_of_thing_code 'Commen' with service_details exactly 'Satisfied' that have related customer_events, timed_status_of_things, and timed_locations_of_things records also have a timed_locations_of_things record dated exactly '2016-12-29 00:39:19'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Commen' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-12-29 00:39:19' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id
FROM things
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Commen'
  AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied'
  AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-12-29 00:39:19'

records.question: Which electronics have a service type of Check and service details exactly Satisfied on 2016-08-04 00:25:55 at location 94425 Nellie Kn, associated with Denesik and Sons Party?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_locations_of_things.location_code = '94425 Nellie Kn' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id
FROM things
JOIN services ON things.service_id = services.service_id
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN properties ON customer_events.property_id = properties.property_id
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
WHERE services.service_type_code = 'Check'
  AND services.service_details = 'Satisfied'
  AND customer_events.date_moved_in = '2016-08-04 00:25:55'
  AND Timed_Locations_of_Things.Location_Code = '94425 Nellie Kn'
  AND organizations.organization_details LIKE '%Denesik and Sons Party%'

records.question: Which things with a service type of Check and service details exactly Satisfied are associated with Denesik and Sons Party, where their services are Moving Out and also exactly Satisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE services.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND services.service_type_code = 'Moving Out' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id
FROM things
JOIN services ON things.service_id = services.service_id
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN customers ON customer_events.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE services.service_type_code = 'Check' AND services.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM services AS s2
    JOIN customer_events AS ce2 ON s2.service_id = ce2.service_id
    WHERE s2.service_type_code = 'Moving Out' AND s2.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND ce2.customer_id = customers.customer_id
)

records.question: Which things with a service type code of Check and type of thing code Commen have service details exactly Satisfied, belong to Denesik and Sons Party, and are linked to services with service type Moving Out that are also exactly Satisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND services.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Commen' AND services.service_type_code = 'Moving Out'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id
FROM things
JOIN services ON things.service_id = services.service_id
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN customer_event_notes ON customer_events.customer_event_id = customer_event_notes.customer_event_id
WHERE things.service_type_code = 'Check'
  AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Commen'
  AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied'
  AND organizations.organization_details LIKE '%Denesik and Sons Party%'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM services AS moving_out_services
    JOIN customer_events AS moving_out_events ON moving_out_services.service_id = moving_out_events.service_id
    WHERE moving_out_services.service_type_code = 'Moving Out'
      AND moving_out_events.customer_event_id = customer_events.customer_event_id
      AND moving_out_services.service_details = 'Satisfied'
  )

records.question: What electronics with a Cleanning service marked as Satisfied belong to Denesik and Sons Party and have organizations whose Check services are also Satisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE services.service_type_code = 'Check' AND services.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND things.service_type_code = 'Cleanning' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id
FROM things
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN customer_event_notes ON customer_events.customer_event_id = customer_event_notes.customer_event_id
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE things.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'Electronics'
  AND customer_event_notes.service_type_code = 'Cleaning'
  AND customer_event_notes.status_of_thing_code = 'Satisfied'
  AND organizations.organization_details LIKE '%Denesik and Sons Party%'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM services AS check_services
    JOIN customer_events AS check_customer_events ON check_services.service_id = check_customer_events.service_id
    JOIN customer_event_notes AS check_customer_event_notes ON check_customer_events.customer_event_id = check_customer_event_notes.customer_event_id
    WHERE check_services.service_type_code = 'Check'
      AND check_customer_event_notes.status_of_thing_code = 'Satisfied'
  )

records.question: What things with service type Check and service details Unsatisfied are linked to Reinger, Hudson and Nolan Group, have a status of In Progress exactly on 2016-11-24 12:44:00, and were located on or before 2017-03-19 13:57:49?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_status_of_things.date_and_date = '2016-11-24 12:44:00' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Reinger, Hudson and Nolan Group' AND timed_status_of_things.status_of_thing_code = 'In Progress' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time <= '2017-03-19 13:57:49' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Unsatisfied'
records.pred_sql:

FROM things
JOIN services ON things.service_id = services.service_id
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN customers ON customer_events.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE services.service_type_code = 'Check'
  AND services.service_details = 'Unsatisfied'
  AND organizations.organization_details LIKE '%Reinger, Hudson and Nolan Group%'
  AND timed_status_of_things.Date_and_Date = '2016-11-24 12:44:00'
  AND timed_locations_of_things.Date_and_Time <= '2017-03-19 13:57:49'
  AND timed_status_of_things.Status_of_Thing_Code = 'In Progress'

records.question: Which electronics from Denesik and Sons Party have a service check marked as satisfied while their pay bills service is unsatisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND services.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND services.service_type_code = 'Pay bills' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT t.thing_id
FROM Things t
JOIN Customer_Events ce ON t.thing_id = ce.thing_id
JOIN Customer_Event_Notes cen ON ce.Customer_Event_ID = cen.Customer_Event_ID
WHERE t.organization_id IN (
    SELECT o.organization_id
    FROM Organizations o
    JOIN Organizations p ON o.parent_organization_id = p.organization_id
    WHERE p.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
)
AND cen.service_type_code = 'Electronics'
AND cen.Status_of_Thing_Code = 'Satisfied'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Customer_Event_Notes cen2
    WHERE cen2.Customer_Event_ID = ce.Customer_Event_ID
    AND cen2.service_type_code = 'Pay Bills'
    AND cen2.Status_of_Thing_Code = 'Satisfied'
)
